examples.question: List the books published between 2002-01-01 and 12-31-2008
examples.answer_QA:
TITLE: varchar: Pride and Prejudice | AUTHOR: varchar: 2008
TITLE: varchar: THE HOBBIT | AUTHOR: varchar: 2002
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT TITLE, AUTHOR FROM BOOK WHERE CAST(AUTHOR AS INT)>2001 AND CAST(AUTHOR AS INT)<2009;

examples.question: List the same books ordered from the most to the least expensive
examples.answer_QA:
TITLE: varchar: THE HOBBIT | AUTHOR: varchar: 2002 | SALEPRICE: number(6,2): 33.15
TITLE: varchar: Pride and Prejudice | AUTHOR: varchar: 2008 | SALEPRICE: number(6,2): 13.45
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT TITLE, AUTHOR, SALEPRICE FROM BOOK WHERE CAST(AUTHOR AS INT)>2001 AND CAST(AUTHOR AS INT)<2009 ORDER BY SALEPRICE DESC;

examples.question: How much revenue was generated from the sale of each of these books?
examples.answer_QA: TITLE: varchar: Pride and Prejudice | AUTHOR: varchar: 2008 | TOTAL_SALES: number(6,2): 60.3
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT TITLE, AUTHOR, (SUM(AMOUNT*(SALEPRICE-PURCHASEPRICE))) FROM (BOOK NATURAL JOIN BOOKS_ORDER) WHERE CAST(AUTHOR AS INT)>2001 AND CAST(AUTHOR AS INT)<2009 ORDER BY SALEPRICE DESC;

examples.question: Total amount per order
examples.answer_QA:
IDORDER: char: 0000001P | TOTAL: number(6,2): 3
IDORDER: char: 0000002P | TOTAL: number(6,2): 1
IDORDER: char: 0000003P | TOTAL: number(6,2): 3
IDORDER: char: 0000004P | TOTAL: number(6,2): 1
IDORDER: char: 0000005P | TOTAL: number(6,2): 5
IDORDER: char: 0000006P | TOTAL: number(6,2): 5
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT IDORDER, SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL FROM BOOKS_ORDER GROUP BY IDORDER;

examples.question: List of clients and the amount they ordered
examples.answer_QA:
IDCLIENT: char: 0000001 | NAME: varchar: James Smith | TOTAL: number(6,2): 4
IDCLIENT: char: 0000002 | NAME: varchar: Laura Jones | TOTAL: number(6,2): 3
IDCLIENT: char: 0000003 | NAME: varchar: Peter Doe | TOTAL: number(6,2): 5
IDCLIENT: char: 0000004 | NAME: varchar: Rose Johnson | TOTAL: number(6,2): 1
IDCLIENT: char: 0000005 | NAME: varchar: Joseph Clinton | TOTAL: number(6,2): 5
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT IDCLIENT, NAME, SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL FROM BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN ORDERS NATURAL JOIN CLIENT GROUP BY IDCLIENT;

examples.question: List of Authors and their book
examples.answer_QA:
NAME: varchar: Jane Austin | TITLE: varchar: Pride and Prejudice
NAME: varchar: George Orwell | TITLE: varchar: 1984
NAME: varchar: J.R.R Tolkien | TITLE: varchar: The Hobbit
NAME: varchar: Antoine de Saint-Exupy | TITLE: varchar: The Little Prince
NAME: varchar: Bram Stoker | TITLE: varchar: Dracula
NAME: varchar: Plato | TITLE: varchar: The Republic
NAME: varchar: Vladimir Nabokov | TITLE: varchar: Lolita
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT NAME, TITLE FROM (AUTHOR JOIN AUTHOR_BOOK ON AUTHOR.IDAUTHOR = AUTHOR_BOOK.AUTHOR) JOIN BOOK ON BOOK.ISBN=AUTHOR_BOOK.ISBN;

examples.question: Author's of the book solt at the highest price
examples.answer_QA: NAME: varchar: Antoine de Saint-Exupy | TITLE: varchr: The Little Prince | PRICE: number(6,2): 73.45
examples.answer_TTSQL: SELECT NAME, TITLE, MAX(SALEPRICE) AS PRICE FROM (AUTHOR JOIN AUTHOR_BOOK ON AUTHOR.IDAUTHOR = AUTHOR_BOOK.AUTHOR) JOIN BOOK ON BOOK.ISBN=AUTHOR_BOOK.ISBN;
